tools.name: search_memories
tools.description: Searches semantically across stored memories using Mem0. Use this to retrieve relevant context about user preferences, patterns, and past interactions before responding. This is for retrieval only - use add_memory to store new memories, and list_memories to see all memories.

query.description: Search query text to find relevant memories

limit.description: Maximum number of memories to return

user.description: User ID to search memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: add_memory
tools.description: Adds new memories to Mem0 storage. Use this when user explicitly asks to remember something or to store conversation context for future retrieval. Supports two forms: simple text memory or conversation messages (auto-extracts memories via LLM). For searching stored memories, use search_memories instead.

text.description: Simple text memory to store (use instead of messages)

messages.description: Array of conversation messages to extract memories from (use instead of text)

user.description: User ID to store memory for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: Lists all stored memories for a user with IDs and creation dates. Use this to see what memories are currently stored. For searching specific memories, use search_memories instead.

user.description: User ID to list memories for (defaults to configured user)

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Deletes memories from Mem0 storage. Use this to remove specific memories or all memories for a user. Supports two modes: delete a specific memory by ID, or delete all memories for a user.

memory_id.description: ID of specific memory to delete (use instead of all flag)

all.description: Delete all memories for the user (use instead of memory_id)

user.description: User ID to delete memories for (required when using all flag)

messages.content: I need to find any memories I've already stored about the TV show I'm developing. Can you check what's currently saved about the main character or storyline?

I didn't find any stored memories about a TV show you're developing. It looks like nothing has been saved yet.

Would you like to share some details about your main character or storyline? I can store that information for you so we can reference it later.

Sure, let me add some details about my main character. Her name is Maya Chen, she's a forensic psychologist who consults on cold cases. I want to note that she has a personal rule about never interviewing victims directly—only their families and witnesses. Also, I'm thinking the season arc involves a case that hits close to home for her, something connected to her own past. Can you save these details so I can reference them later?

function_call.name: skill-tools-add_memory
function_call.arguments: {"text": "TV show main character: Maya Chen, a forensic psychologist who consults on cold cases. Personal rule: never interviews victims directly—only their families and witnesses. Season arc involves a case that hits close to home, connected to her own past."}

messages.content: {"memory": {"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "TV show main character: Maya Chen, a forensic psychologist who consults on cold cases. Personal rule: never interviews victims directly—only their families and witnesses. Season arc involves a case that hits close to home, connected to her own past."}}
messages.name: skill-tools-add_memory

messages.content:
Got it! I've saved these details about your character:

- **Maya Chen** – forensic psychologist who consults on cold cases
- **Personal rule** – only interviews victims' families and witnesses, never the victims themselves
- **Season arc** – a case connected to her own past

Let me know if you want to add more details or make changes as your show develops!
Can you show me what memories are currently stored? I want to make sure everything was saved correctly after adding Maya Chen's details.

{"memories": [{"id": "m2", "user": "None", "text": "TV show main character: Maya Chen, a forensic psychologist who consults on cold cases. Personal rule: never interviews victims directly—only their families and witnesses. Season arc involves a case that hits close to home, connected to her own past."}]}
messages.name: skill-tools-list_memories

messages.content:
Everything looks good! Here's what's currently stored:

**Memory ID: m2**
> TV show main character: Maya Chen, a forensic psychologist who consults on cold cases. Personal rule: never interviews victims directly—only their families and witnesses. Season arc involves a case that hits close to home, connected to her own past.

Maya Chen's details were saved correctly. Let me know if you'd like to add more details about the show or make any changes!
Is there anything in the memory store that needs to be deleted, or is the Maya Chen information still all relevant?

Based on what's currently stored, there's nothing that needs to be deleted. You only have one memory in the store (ID: m2), which is the Maya Chen information we just added. It's all still relevant and up to date.
